---
title: "related ITensor"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

## Index

```{julia}
using ITensors
@doc Index
```

```{text}
"""
dim: the dim of every subspace.
id: 唯一标识符, to judge whether the index are same.
"Qubit,Site,n=1": tags of this index, which could be definite by yourself, where
    Qubit: system of qubit
    Site: the index would express a qubit site
    n=1: the first qubit site
(dim=2|id=451|"Qubit,Site,n=1")': 区分相同的索引对象(to express output or input), because Itensor will multiplication equal index.
"""
(dim=2|id=451|"Qubit,Site,n=1")
```

### Definition

```{julia}
@show i = Index(2, "i");
@show i'; # distinguish the same index, which is important for multiplication of ITensor.
@show site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",2); # a special index in RandomMeas.jl, which is defined as [Index(2, "Qubit,Site,n=$i") for i in 1:2]
```
